prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DISCTHROWER-ORG Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 4.5 In Clay Target Disc Thrower Right and Left Handed 19 In Long Description: Are you an avid clay target shooter? Then you need the ASR Outdoor clay target disc thrower for on-the-go target practice. This manual disc thrower fits universal standard 4.5" clay targets, making this an excellent option for skeet, range, and backyard target shooting.

Designed for both long and short-distance shooting, you can use this convenient disc thrower both indoors and outdoors. Take it out when you go hunting or camping for extra practice. It's also built to be used by both left and right-handers and has a lightweight, portable and durable design with an overall 19" handle length.

In addition, the disc launcher comes in a bright, high-contrast orange color that is easier to see down range than similar throwers, making it a safer choice to throw at any speed, indoors or outdoors. This is a great option for beginners, intermediate, and even experienced target shooters. Search Terms: skeet thrower shooting accessories gun range disc thrower clay shooter clay targets shooting target target shooting gun targets for shooting range hunting gear hunting accessories indoor shooting range outdoor shooting range camping accessories Features: - CLAY TARGET DISC THROWER - ASR Outdoor manual disc thrower fits universal standard 4.5" clay targets; great for skeet, range, garden, backyard and camping target shooting - LONG AND SHORT DISTANCE - Designed for both long and short distance target shooting indoors and outdoors; ideal hunting and camping target practice accessory - LEFT AND RIGHT HANDED - Built to be used by both left and right-handers; lightweight, portable and durable design; 19" overall handle length is easy to use for men and women - HIGH VISIBILITY - Comes in bright, super-visible contrast orange that is easier to see down range; safely throw at any speed indoors or outdoors - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plastic; Color: high-visibility orange; Handle length: 19"; Clay target fit: 4.5" standard/universal; Left and right-handed; Indoor and outdoor; Short and long distance === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4.5 In Orange Clay Target Disc Thrower

anthropic.title_differentiation: Left And Right Handed, 19 Inch Handle, High Visibility Orange, Indoor And Outdoor, Portable And Durable
